content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta / test language WARN — release_notes.txt calls this a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2), while description.txt makes no such caveat.
Pierre: Apple reviewers reject builds whose release notes or metadata suggest the submitted version is unfinished or a beta test, since the App Store is meant for finished software. Here the release notes explicitly say "public beta" and "expect rough edges," which may trigger review questions even though the description itself is clean. Rewrite the release notes to describe finished, shipped functionality (e.g. "Improved sync reliability") and remove any beta/testing language before submission.
